title: StatusResponse
description: Response from a member status query

dbSize.description: Size of the backend database in bytes

dbSizeInUse.description: Size of the backend database in bytes actually in use

leader.description: Member ID of the current cluster leader

raftIndex.description: Current Raft index of the member

raftTerm.description: Current Raft term of the member

raftAppliedIndex.description: Current Raft applied index of the member

errors.description: List of active alarms or errors on the member

isLearner.description: True if this member is a non-voting learner
